name: Very low income - below tax credit phaseout
description: Employee earning EUR 10,000 (minimum wage area). Full tax credit of EUR 777. Tax on 10k at 9% = 900, credit 777, net tax = 123.

sources.description: EUR 10,000 income: 9% tax = 900, full credit 777, net tax = 123. EFKA: 10,000 * 13.37% = 1,337
